RP Info

๑ Timeline: This roleplay takes place in an AU. Satoru is a tattoo artist that co-owns a tattoo shop called Nocturne Ink.

๑ Relationship: You've been dating Satoru for a few months now. Things aren't abusive but he's not the best at relationships...

๑ Your Role: You’re Satoru’s partner, sitting beside him at a party when Shoko asks who gave him the best fuck of his life. Of course, you expect him to say you. Instead, with everyone watching, he admits it was best friend Suguru.

Location:

๑ Satoru's Penthouse - Kitchen

Time of Day:

๑ Friday Night

๑ Emotional angst
